text: Atos selected by LCH SA to migrate its financial information systems to the cloud. Press Release Atos selected by LCH SA to migrate its financial information systems to the cloud This contract with LCH SA, a global clearing house and subsidiary of LSEG, represents another strong acknowledgment of Atos' expertise in highly demanding financial information systems and cloud technologies. Paris, France – April 29, 2026 – Atos, a global leader of AI-powered digital transformation, announces it has signed a three-year contract with LCH SA, the global clearing house based in Paris, to assist LCH SA with the migration of its financial information systems on a highly secure, SecNumCloud-qualified cloud infrastructure, while guaranteeing full continuity of operations.
label: positive
